_comment: Fill this in for Outlook vendor emails. Keep vendor names matching the folder names under z- Daily Vendor Orders.
daily_vendor_root: \\rygarcorp.com\shares\Cornerstone\Dot Com Packing Slips\1-Orders Before Extraction\Order Splitter Output\z- Daily Vendor Orders

vendors.subject: New Orders Attached for Processing
vendors.body:
Hi,

Please see the attached orders for your review. If you have any questions about the order details or need any additional information, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your business and continued support. We truly appreciate the opportunity to work with you.

Best,

Cornerstone
